name: mobitrack
description: MobiTrack - Mobile Phone Shop Management System

scripts.build: echo 'Static HTML app - no build step needed'
scripts.apk: npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease && cd .. && "D:\android-sdk\build-tools\35.0.0\apksigner.bat" sign --ks "C:\Users\omare\.android\debug.keystore" --ks-pass pass:android --ks-key-alias androiddebugkey --key-pass pass:android --out MobiTrack-release.apk android\app\build\outputs\apk\release\app-release-unsigned.apk && echo APK ready: MobiTrack-release.apk
